title: malus × zumi var. calocarpa
intro: Malus × zumi var. calocarpa is a plant variety known as the Chinese crabapple, a cross between the Chinese apple (Malus baccata) and the European crabapple (Malus domestica). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Malus × zumi var. calocarpa include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. Malus × zumi var. calocarpa is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
